scripts.tunnel-named: if not defined CLOUDFLARE_TUNNEL_TOKEN (echo CLOUDFLARE_TUNNEL_TOKEN is not set && exit /b 1) else cloudflared tunnel run --token %CLOUDFLARE_TUNNEL_TOKEN%
scripts.dev-simple: start "Server" npm start & start "Tunnel" npm run tunnel-named
scripts.dev-optimized: start "Server" npm start & start "Tunnel" npm run tunnel-named
